Unicode Viewer

This app example shows a two-pane unicode browser with block navigation, character grid rendering, and click-to-copy clipboard support.

Unicode Blocks

Basic Latin
U+0000..U+007F (128 chars)

Basic Latin

U+0000..U+007F (128 chars)

Latin-1 Supplement

U+0080..U+00FF (128 chars)

Latin Extended-A

U+0100..U+017F (128 chars)

Latin Extended-B

U+0180..U+024F (208 chars)

IPA Extensions

U+0250..U+02AF (96 chars)

Spacing Modifier Letters

U+02B0..U+02FF (80 chars)
